LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Horde_Desc: Consumes one horde gate sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and tears open several perimeter breach fronts that pulse ordinary abyssal warforms into the map. It is not a boss ritual. It is the first deliberate army-scale summon after Reactor Saint.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Horde_Rewards: • Massive residue and battlefield salvage payout • First post-saint army-scale pressure check • Uses regular abyssal warforms instead of a named boss reward ladder
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Horde_SideEffects: • Opens multiple perimeter breach fronts instead of one local spawn • Pressure scales hard with colony size, wealth, and protocol difficulty • Does not grant boss or mini-boss drops even when the wave becomes enormous
LanguageData.ABY_HordeGateSummonSuccessDesc: Multiple perimeter rupture fronts are opening. Ordinary abyssal warforms are spilling onto the map in repeated portal pulses.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Horde: Guaranteed: high residue yield and wide cleanup salvage from a full army-scale breach.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Horde: Progression: stress-tests multi-front late defense after Reactor Saint without skipping straight into dominion crisis logic.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeRitualMeta: Sigils on map: {0} • Fronts: {1} • Pulses: {2} • Forecast: {3} • Protocol: {4}
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_HordeLocked: The horde gate remains dormant until the first Reactor Saint kill is recorded on this save.
